instructions.summary: Connect a Bluesky account to Zernio — zero gatekeeping, tech/indie audience, no karma requirements.
instructions.why: Bluesky has no karma gates, no moderation blocks, no approval wait times. The tech-forward and indie hacker community there overlaps heavily with digital nomads. Agent can post immediately after connection.
instructions.exact_action:
1. If you don't have a Bluesky account: go to bsky.app and sign up (free, instant)
2. Once logged in: go to Settings → App Passwords → Add App Password
3. Name it 'zernio', click Create
4. Copy the generated password (format: xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx)
5. Go to https://app.zernio.com → Accounts → Add Account → Bluesky
6. Enter your handle (e.g. yourname.bsky.social) and the app password
7. Once connected, copy the account ID from the accounts list
8. Reply to the agent with: 'Bluesky connected, handle: [handle], account ID: [id]'

The agent will store the ID and post immediately.
instructions.unblocks: Autonomous Bluesky distribution — zero gatekeeping, posts live instantly
